mapper.sql: record_id, content_type, content_id, approval_status, audit_reason, insult_words, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_content_audit_record (content_type, content_id, approval_status, audit_reason, insult_words, create_time) VALUES (#{record.content_type}, #{record.content_id}, #{record.approval_status}, #{record.audit_reason}, #{record.insult_words}, NOW())
